name: Claude Code
description: Local coding agent via the Claude Code CLI (claude --print). Full agentic mode with file editing, shell commands, and test running. The CLAUDE unit type in RepoCiv is a direct bypass to this harness.
auth: none (local binary; credentials managed by claude CLI's own auth flow)

session.flag: -c / --continue (resumes most recent conversation in the working directory)
session.stateful_agents: Pass -c for stateful unit types to persist conversation across missions
session.stateless_agents: Omit -c; each mission starts a fresh context

model_selection: --model flag; user selects via UI model picker
note: CLAUDE always routes directly to this harness regardless of the harness selector in the UI.
